_comment: Pharma AI & Data Watch — ingestion pipeline configuration

newsapi._comment: Free tier at newsapi.org — 1,000 requests/day, no credit card needed

claude_enhancer._comment: Uses claude-haiku to clean up PubMed/bioRxiv raw abstracts

search_queries.q: artificial intelligence drug discovery OR drug design OR lead optimization
machine learning AlphaFold protein structure prediction pharmaceutical
deep learning ADMET toxicity prediction drug development
machine learning regulatory EMA FDA approval pharmaceutical
AI regulatory science ICH reflection paper guideline
artificial intelligence clinical trial adaptive decentralised pharmacovigilance
natural language processing pharmacovigilance adverse event signal detection
EHDS European Health Data Space secondary use health data governance regulation
IDMP SPOR FHIR OMOP data standard interoperability pharmaceutical regulatory
DARWIN EU real-world data network federated analysis pharmacoepidemiology EMA
real-world evidence data quality fit-for-purpose regulatory EMA FDA
federated learning privacy-preserving health data pseudonymisation pharmaceutical
patient registry disease registry data governance rare disease EMA

event_sources._comment: All tested RSS event feeds return 404. Events are sourced via 4 dedicated NewsAPI queries instead (webinars, conferences, AI governance events, health data events). Re-enable with valid RSS URLs if available.

data_sources._comment: Curated feeds specifically for the Data tab: interoperability, FHIR, EHR, data standards, health data policy.

ai_news_sources._comment: RSS feeds for the AI News tab. require_pharma=false so all AI content passes. Score gate uses ai_keywords only.

feeds.name: TechCrunch AI
feeds._keep: Model launches, lab funding, enterprise AI adoption, big tech AI strategy

feeds.name: MIT Technology Review
feeds._keep: AI safety/alignment analysis, capabilities deep-dives, AI in science, policy analysis

feeds.name: The Verge
feeds._keep: Consumer AI products, big tech AI competitive dynamics, AI hardware launches

feeds.name: Nature Machine Intelligence
feeds._keep: ALL peer-reviewed AI research — 100% signal, no filtering needed

feeds.name: VentureBeat AI
feeds._keep: Enterprise LLM deployment, AI infrastructure, open-source model releases

feeds.name: Wired AI
feeds._keep: AI ethics/safety long-form, lab strategy investigations, AI in science, governance analysis

feeds.name: Ars Technica AI
feeds._keep: Technical deep-dives, AI hardware/compute, AI law/copyright, benchmarks, security

feeds.name: The Register AI
feeds._keep: EU AI Act news, enterprise cloud AI, AI chip market, critical/contrarian AI coverage

feeds.name: Hugging Face Blog
feeds._keep: New model releases (especially biomedical), open-source AI ecosystem, benchmarks/leaderboards

feeds.name: Import AI
feeds._keep: Weekly expert curation of AI research (Jack Clark, ex-OpenAI) — highest editorial signal

_ai_keywords_comment: Used by relevance_score() for ainews articles. Covers what tech media writes: 'AI' abbreviation, lab names, capability terms, not just 'artificial intelligence'.
